items.title: Because sports are fun, I generally prefer chaos. Wild upsets. Teams & players that do stuff they "shouldn't." Actions that make no sense.
items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt:
Because sports are fun, I generally prefer chaos. Wild upsets. Teams & players that do stuff they "shouldn't." Actions that make no sense. 

It's why there's a part of me that really would find it hilarious if I'm writing about the Bucks acquiring Kyrie Irving and tripling down on the Giannis era.

items.title: Carter Bryant looks forward to every Spurs road trip.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Carter Bryant looks forward to every Spurs road trip.

Short or long, the flights give the rookie a chance to spend time with his "brother.”

"Me and Vic sit next to each other on the plane, so we've had a ton of conversations,” Bryant said.

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: Why Spurs rookie Carter Bryant looks up to his 'brother' Victor Wembanyama
media.description: The two youngsters have built a strong rapport during Bryant's rookie season. The tight-knit bonds between all the Spurs' youngsters bodes well for the team's future.

items.title: June 13, 2004: Chauncey Billups lobs to Rasheed Wallace during the Pistons' 88-80 win over the Lakers in Game 4 of the NBA Finals.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 13, 2004: Chauncey Billups lobs to Rasheed Wallace during the Pistons' 88-80 win over the Lakers in Game 4 of the NBA Finals.

Wallace had 26 PTS/13 REB/2 BLK and Billups scored 23 PTS as Detroit took a 3-1 series lead. Shaquille O'Neal had 36 PTS/20 REB for Los Angeles.

items.title: Down 17+ points in the final 9 minutes of a Finals game?
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
Down 17+ points in the final 9 minutes of a Finals game?

Since 1971, teams were 0-96 in that situation entering Game 4. Then Brunson, OG and the Knicks completed the largest comeback in Finals history 🔥

The NBA Finals continue TONIGHT with NYK (3-1) SAS Game 5 at 8:30pm/et on ABC. 🏆

items.title: Forgive Bluesky poster/radio person/podcaster where I heard this but can't recall:
items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt:
Forgive Bluesky poster/radio person/podcaster where I heard this but can't recall:

What's interesting about Giannis Antetokounmpo wanting to go to Boston ... the Celtics kinda have to stay out of the luxury tax again this year too (like the Bucks).

Key players would have to go.
